Prediction: No

The current visit record does not provide any explicit evidence of a lipid disorder such as hypercholesterolemia, hyperlipidemia, or any other specific lipid metabolism disorder. The diagnoses listed primarily focus on cardiac and kidney issues, as well as an infection related to a cardiac device. While the patient is on medications that may be associated with cardiovascular health, there is no mention of any lipid-related conditions or ongoing management of such disorders. Therefore, based on the information provided, it is not reasonable to predict that "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will be diagnosed in the next hospital visit.
